name: Chicken Breasts with Yoghurt & Feta
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together the yoghurt, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper. Reserve about 1/4 cup for serving with the chicken.
2. Add the chicken breasts to the bowl with the yoghurt mixture, turning to coat, and allow to marinate for 20-30 minutes.
3. Grill or broil the chicken breasts for a few minutes on each side, sprinkling them with the crumbled feta after turning them once.
4. Garnish with chopped dill and olives. Serve with the reserved sauce.
5. Always double the recipe – the chicken is great cold or in a sandwich.
